title: helichrysum margaritaceum
intro: Helichrysum margaritaceum, also known as Everlast or Immortelle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Helichrysum margaritaceum include its ability to improve circulation, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is typically prepared as an essential oil, extract, or dried flower, which can be used in various herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
